summary: PR #75869 is the canonical automerge target. The hydrated artifact shows a passing ClawSweeper review and passing relevant checks, but GitHub reports the PR as dirty/conflicting against current main, so the safe next step is a bounded same-branch repair/rebase rather than merge. Linked PR #75186 is related plugin-management work but has a separate Gateway RPC scope and its own unresolved review findings.

actions.reason: Canonical PR is safe to update but not merge-ready because it conflicts with current main; job forbids direct merge and allows fix/raise_pr only.
A cluster-scoped fix artifact is required for the executor to repair the canonical PR branch.
Same plugin-management area, but different surface and review state; keep it open outside this bounded automerge repair cluster.
